1.description: get Kristiansand municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get buildings in Kristiansand municipality filtered by kommunenummer

3.description: get 200-year storm-flood polygons reduced to Kristiansand extent

5.description: compute distances between buildings and 200-year storm polygons

6.description: min distance per building and include building attributes

9.description: attach county polygon to the top 10 buildings to get county name

10.description: select final output columns including municipality and county names and distance

args.sql:
SELECT objid, kommunenummer, kommunenavn,
  ST_XMin(omrade) AS minx, ST_YMin(omrade) AS miny, ST_XMax(omrade) AS maxx, ST_YMax(omrade) AS maxy
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenummer = '4204';

args.sql:
WITH kommune AS (
  SELECT omrade AS kommune_geom
  FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
  WHERE kommunenummer = '4204'
)
SELECT s.*
FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna s
WHERE ST_Intersects(s.omrade, (SELECT kommune_geom FROM kommune));

args.sql:
SELECT b.objid AS byg_objid, b.bygningsnummer, b.bygningsstatus, b.kommunenummer, b.kommunenavn, b.bygningid,
  ST_Distance(b.representasjonspunkt, s.omrade) AS distance_m
FROM matrikkelenbygning_fe504ac373564e10b85865ef2a507c63.bygning b
CROSS JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT s.omrade FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna s
  JOIN kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune k
  ON ST_Intersects(s.omrade, k.omrade)
  WHERE k.kommunenummer = '4204'
) AS s
WHERE b.kommunenummer = '4204' AND b.representasjonspunkt IS NOT NULL
AND ST_DWithin(b.representasjonspunkt, s.omrade, 50)
ORDER BY distance_m ASC
LIMIT 100;

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT objid, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Kristiansand%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [matrikkelenbygning]
SELECT objid, bygningsnummer, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, bygningsstatus, representasjonspunkt, bygningid
FROM matrikkelenbygning_fe504ac373564e10b85865ef2a507c63.bygning
WHERE kommunenummer = '4204' AND representasjonspunkt IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT omrade FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna LIMIT 1;
